allow: PowerShell(try { $t=Measure-Command { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/monitor/snapshot?force=1' -TimeoutSec 70 }; "ms=$\([int]$t.TotalMilliseconds\) agents=$\($r.agents.Count\) ONLINE=$\($r.presence.online\) AWAY=$\($r.presence.away\) OFFLINE=$\($r.presence.offline\)"; Write-Host "away reasons still showing:"; $r.awayBreakdown | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_[0]\) = $\($_[1]\)" } } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
